case_title: ZOILA PINEDA MENDEZ RESPONDENT VS. PATRICIA MORENO DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT PATRICIA MORENO DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL AS TO RESPONDENT MENDEZ, ZOILA PINEDA HEARING SET FOR JUN-24-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2004 - JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF ZOILA PINEDA MENDEZ, RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST PATRICIA MORENO DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL IN THE PRINCIPAL SUM OF $4,599.00 AND $22.00 IN COSTS. JUDGE PRO TEM-MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK-PARAM NATT; NOT REPORTED (D525)
MINUTES FOR JUN-24-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MENDEZ, ZOILA PINEDA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT PATRICIA MORENO DBA MARINA'S TRAVEL $4,599.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,621.00, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
